message:
chore(deps): add ftui dependency and register new benchmark/binary targets

Workspace Cargo.toml: adds ftui (FrankenTUI) as an external workspace
dependency, sourced from the local path /dp/frankentui/crates/ftui.
This provides the terminal UI framework used by the new e2e-dashboard
binary for live progress visualization during E2E runs.

crates/fsqlite-e2e/Cargo.toml:
  - Adds ftui workspace dependency with the "crossterm" feature for
    terminal backend support.
  - Sets autobins = false to explicitly control binary targets (needed
    because the crate now has multiple binaries in src/bin/).
  - Registers the e2e-dashboard binary (src/bin/e2e_dashboard.rs).
  - Registers five new [[bench]] targets (write_throughput_bench,
    read_heavy_bench, large_txn_bench, mixed_oltp_bench,
    concurrent_write_bench), all with harness = false for Criterion.

Cargo.lock: adds the ftui crate family (ftui, ftui-core, ftui-backend,
ftui-extras, ftui-i18n, ftui-layout, ftui-render, ftui-runtime,
ftui-style, ftui-text, ftui-widgets) and their transitive dependencies
including crossterm 0.29, mio, signal-hook, ropey (rope data structure
for text editing), rustc-hash, lru, unicode-display-width,
unicode-segmentation, unicode-width, derive_more, and document-features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
